name: Coze MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Coze MCP server from ByteDance (coze-dev organization) enabling AI agents to interact with the Coze AI platform — calling Coze bots and workflows, accessing Coze's knowledge bases, triggering Coze plugins, and integrating Coze's multi-agent capabilities into external agent workflows. Coze is ByteDance's AI development platform popular in Asia.
use_cases: Calling Coze bots and AI workflows from orchestration agents
Accessing Coze knowledge bases for domain-specific information from research agents
Triggering Coze plugins for specialized tasks from automation agents
Integrating Coze's multi-agent workflows into external agent pipelines from integration agents
Using Coze as a specialized AI service within a larger agent ecosystem
not_for: Teams not using the Coze platform (use Claude, OpenAI, or Gemini MCPs for those)
Production deployments requiring non-Chinese cloud data residency (Coze data in ByteDance infrastructure)
Teams with strict data sovereignty requirements outside China/Singapore
best_when: A development team using Coze as their AI platform needs to integrate Coze bots and workflows into external agent systems — official MCP from ByteDance's Coze team.
avoid_when: You don't use Coze, or have data sovereignty requirements that preclude ByteDance infrastructure.

auth.notes: Coze Personal Access Token (PAT) or OAuth2. Set COZE_API_TOKEN environment variable. Get token from Coze platform settings. OAuth2 for user-level access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Coze free tier with usage limits on bot calls and workflow executions
pricing.paid_tiers: Coze Pro and Enterprise plans for higher usage limits
pricing.notes: Coze has a generous free tier for developers. Pro/Enterprise plans for production scale. MCP server is free open source from ByteDance's Coze team.

performance.rate_limits: Coze API rate limits by plan; free tier is more restricted

known_agent_gotchas: Data processed by ByteDance infrastructure — evaluate data sovereignty for sensitive use cases
Coze's bot ecosystem is primarily in Chinese — English bots available but less common
Official MCP from coze-dev org — well-maintained and documented
Rate limits on free tier can restrict agent workflows — monitor usage
Coze workflows are asynchronous — implement proper polling for workflow completion
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. PAT or OAuth2. Official ByteDance Coze MCP. Data processed on ByteDance infrastructure (China/Singapore). Review data residency requirements. Scope API token to minimum permissions.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. PAT/OAuth2. ByteDance infrastructure. Review data residency — China/Singapore. Official Coze MCP. Token security is important.
